betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Fluids§f

§aHarness molten, elemental, fossil, and bio fluids for power and processing!§f

§bThermal Foundation§f adds fluids used in Thermal Expansion machines and dynamos.

§6Molten Fluids (Magma Crucible)§f:
§b• Destabilized Redstone§f — §e100 mB§f from dust, §e900 mB§f from block. Emits §elight 7§f. Conducts redstone signals. From Clathrate (§e250 mB§f) or ore (§e1,000 mB§f).
§b• Energized Glowstone§f — Floats upward, condenses above §eY 120§f.
§b• Resonant Ender§f — Teleports entities on contact.

§6Elemental Fluids (Magma Crucible, 250mB, 8,000 RF)§f:
§b• Blazing Pyrotheum§f — Damages entities (§e2§f per ½s). Ignites fires. Smelts cobble→stone, sand→glass. §aMagmatic Dynamo: 2,000,000 RF/bucket§f.
§b• Gelid Cryotheum§f — Damages entities (§e2§f per ½s). Covers blocks in snow. Water→Ice, Lava→Obsidian. §aReactant Dynamo: 400,000 RF per 100mB§f. §aCoolant: 3x effective, 12x duration vs water§f.
§b• Zephyrean Aerotheum§f — Slows entities. Dissipates above §eY 120§f.
§b• Tectonic Petrotheum§f — Breaks stone blocks on contact.

§6Fossil Fuels§f: Crude Oil, Liquifacted Coal, Naphtha, Refined Fuel
§6Bio Fluids§f: Seed Oil, Biocrude, Grassoline, Resin, Sap, Tree Oil
§6Other§f: Primal Mana
